name: Nickmoon Mware
headline: Data Scientist / Business Analyst / Educator
highlights: Built end-to-end Python pipelines for cleaning, EDA, and feature engineering on real-world datasets.
Built regression and classification models on 16,519 customer records to predict monthly spend and subscription likelihood.
Developed and evaluated regression, classification, and Prophet forecasting models for predictive insights.
Completed graduate NLP and speech research using spectrogram-based workflows and PyTorch.
Maintained real-time transportation data pipelines processing 100+ sensor inputs.
Diagnosed and resolved 50+ system and data issues using SQL, Python, and Linux.
Improved data processing efficiency by 30% through structured cleaning and validation.
Created Tableau dashboards and reports for non-technical stakeholders.
Taught Python fundamentals and mentored applied analytics and chatbot development projects.

projects.name: Predictive Modeling & Forecasting
projects.summary: Built regression, classification, and Prophet time-series models using Python, feature engineering, and validation on historical data, including customer spend and subscription modeling.

projects.name: Customer Prediction Models for an eBook Store
projects.summary: Built regression and classification models on 16,519 customer records to support customer targeting, monthly spend prediction, and subscription likelihood analysis.

projects.name: NLP Sentiment Analysis
projects.summary: Used NLTK to classify customer review sentiment and translate outputs into business-friendly NPS-style metrics.

projects.name: Voice User Interface Accent Research
projects.summary: Processed speech audio, generated spectrograms, and trained a PyTorch-supported speech workflow focused on transcription accuracy and accent-aware voice user experiences.

projects.name: Tableau Dashboards
projects.summary: Designed dashboards to visualize trends, forecasts, and KPIs for non-technical stakeholders.
